# `frontend-structure.md`

```markdown
# Frontend Structure & Component Registry
# Generated by: Engineer / Architect
# Consumed by: code-gen-role.md ONLY — Frontend Generation
# Source: ux-output.md (v2.0)
# DO NOT EDIT manually after code generation begins
# Project Folder: /freelanceflow/frontend/

---

## 1. Frontend Tech Stack
- Framework: React 18 + Vite 5
- Language: JavaScript ES2022
- Styling: Tailwind CSS 4.x (non-negotiable)
- State Management: Context API (AuthContext) + local state via hooks
- HTTP Client: Axios
- Routing: React Router v6
- Build Tool: Vite 5
- Test Framework: Vitest + Testing Library
- Chart Library: Recharts (for earnings bar chart on dashboard)
- Date Handling: date-fns

---

## 2. Frontend Packages
| Package | Version | Import Name | Purpose |
|---------|---------|-------------|---------|
| react | ^18.2.0 | React | UI library |
| react-dom | ^18.2.0 | ReactDOM | DOM renderer |
| react-router-dom | ^6.20.0 | { BrowserRouter, Route, ... } | Client-side routing |
| axios | ^1.6.0 | axios | HTTP client for all API calls |
| tailwindcss | ^4.0.0 | — (PostCSS plugin) | Utility-first CSS |
| @tailwindcss/vite | ^4.0.0 | — | Tailwind Vite integration |
| recharts | ^2.10.0 | { BarChart, Bar, ... } | Earnings bar chart on dashboard |
| date-fns | ^3.0.0 | { format, isAfter, ... } | Date formatting and comparison |
| @heroicons/react | ^2.0.18 | { BellIcon, ... } | Icon set matching outlined design style |
| vitest | ^1.0.0 | — (dev) | Unit test runner |
| @testing-library/react | ^14.1.0 | { render, screen, ... } | Component testing |
| @testing-library/user-event | ^14.5.0 | userEvent | Simulated user interactions in tests |
| @vitejs/plugin-react | ^4.2.0 | — | Vite React plugin |
| autoprefixer | ^10.4.16 | — (dev) | CSS autoprefixer |
| postcss | ^8.4.31 | — (dev) | PostCSS for Tailwind |

---

## 3. Frontend Environment Variables
| Variable Name | Example Value | Used In File(s) | Required |
|---------------|---------------|-----------------|----------|
| VITE_API_BASE_URL | http://localhost:5000/api | src/services/api.js | yes |

## 5. Page Registry

### PAGE: src/pages/LandingPage.jsx
- **Maps to UX Screen:** S-001 — Landing Page
- **Single Responsibility:** Renders the public marketing landing page
- **Route Path:** `/`
- **Auth Required:** No
- **Imports From:**
  - Layout: PublicLayout.jsx (no sidebar)
  - Components: LandingNavBar.jsx, HeroSection.jsx, FeatureCardsRow.jsx
- **Data Flow:** No API calls — fully static content
- **User Flows:**
  - "Log In" button → `/login`
  - "Start managing better" CTA → `/signup`
- **States to Handle:**
  - Loading: N/A — static
  - Error: N/A
  - Empty: N/A
  - Success: N/A
- **Mapped Story:** US-LAND-01

---

### PAGE: src/pages/LoginPage.jsx
- **Maps to UX Screen:** S-002 — Login (left half of the auth page)
- **Single Responsibility:** Renders the login form page
- **Route Path:** `/login`
- **Auth Required:** No (redirect to /dashboard if already authenticated)
- **Imports From:**
  - Components: AuthBrandingPanel.jsx, LoginCard.jsx
- **Data Flow:**
  - Calls hook: useAuth().login(email, password) on submit
  - On success: navigate to `/dashboard`
- **User Flows:**
  - Successful login → `/dashboard`
  - "Sign Up" link → `/signup`
  - "Forgot password?" → `/forgot-password`
- **States to Handle:**
  - Loading: LoginCard button shows spinner
  - Error: inline error message inside LoginCard
  - Empty: N/A
  - Success: redirect to /dashboard
- **Mapped Story:** US-AUTH-01

---

### PAGE: src/pages/SignUpPage.jsx
- **Maps to UX Screen:** S-002 — Sign Up (right card of the auth page)
- **Single Responsibility:** Renders the sign-up/registration form page
- **Route Path:** `/signup`
- **Auth Required:** No
- **Imports From:**
  - Components: AuthBrandingPanel.jsx, SignUpCard.jsx
- **Data Flow:**
  - Calls hook: useAuth().register(name, email, password) on submit
  - On success: navigate to `/dashboard`
- **User Flows:**
  - Successful registration → `/dashboard`
  - "Log In" link → `/login`
- **States to Handle:**
  - Loading: button spinner
  - Error: inline field errors
  - Empty: N/A
  - Success: redirect
- **Mapped Story:** US-AUTH-01

---

### PAGE: src/pages/ForgotPasswordPage.jsx
- **Maps to UX Screen:** S-016 — Forgot Password
- **Single Responsibility:** Renders the forgot password request + success state
- **Route Path:** `/forgot-password`
- **Auth Required:** No
- **Imports From:**
  - Components: AuthBrandingPanel.jsx
  - Local state: email input, submitted boolean
- **Data Flow:**
  - Calls api.forgotPassword(email) on submit
  - On success: shows success confirmation card (no navigation)
- **User Flows:**
  - "Back to Login" → `/login`
- **States to Handle:**
  - Loading: button spinner
  - Error: inline red error under email field
  - Empty: N/A
  - Success: card transforms to success confirmation state (checkmark + message)
- **Mapped Story:** US-AUTH-02

---

### PAGE: src/pages/DashboardPage.jsx
- **Maps to UX Screen:** S-003 (Dashboard) + S-006 (My Projects tab)
- **Single Responsibility:** Renders the main freelancer dashboard with earnings, invoice summary, active projects, and recent invoices
- **Route Path:** `/dashboard`
- **Auth Required:** Yes
- **Imports From:**
  - Layout: AppLayout.jsx
  - Components: EarningsBarChart.jsx, OutstandingInvoicesCard.jsx, ActiveProjectsCard.jsx, RecentInvoicesTable.jsx, ProjectSummaryCard.jsx, TopHeaderBar.jsx
  - Hooks: useDashboard.js
  - Context: AuthContext
- **Data Flow:**
  - Calls hook: useDashboard().getMetrics() → fetches dashboard stats
  - Passes earningsByMonth to EarningsBarChart
  - Passes outstandingInvoicesCount, outstandingInvoicesTotal to OutstandingInvoicesCard
  - Passes activeProjectsCount to ActiveProjectsCard
  - Passes recentInvoices to RecentInvoicesTable
- **User Flows:**
  - "My Projects" tab → shows project card grid (S-006 view)
  - "My Invoices" tab → navigate to `/invoices/my`
  - OutstandingInvoicesCard click → `/invoices`
  - ActiveProjectsCard click → `/projects`
  - RecentInvoicesTable row click → `/invoices/my` with selected invoice
- **States to Handle:**
  - Loading: each card shows LoadingSkeleton
  - Error: card-level error messages with retry
  - Empty: stat cards show "0"; table shows empty message
  - Success: all metrics displayed
- **Mapped Story:** US-DASH-01, US-DASH-02

---

### PAGE: src/pages/ClientsPage.jsx
- **Maps to UX Screen:** S-004 — Clients List
- **Single Responsibility:** Renders the client management list page
- **Route Path:** `/clients`
- **Auth Required:** Yes
- **Imports From:**
  - Layout: AppLayout.jsx
  - Components: ClientsTable.jsx, ClientCardMobile.jsx, ClientAddEditModal.jsx, SearchInput.jsx, SelectDropdown.jsx, PrimaryButton.jsx, FilterTabBar.jsx
  - Hooks: useClients.js
- **Data Flow:**
  - Calls hook: useClients().fetchClients({ search, status, page }) on mount and filter change
  - Passes clients array to ClientsTable / ClientCardMobile
  - Edit action → opens ClientAddEditModal pre-filled
  - Archive action → calls useClients().archiveClient(id)
  - Invite action → calls useClients().inviteClient(id)
- **User Flows:**
  - "Add Client" → opens ClientAddEditModal (add mode)
  - Client row click → `/clients/:id`
  - "Edit" action → opens ClientAddEditModal (edit mode)
  - "Invite" action → calls invite API, shows toast
  - "Archive" action → opens ConfirmDialog → calls archiveClient
- **States to Handle:**
  - Loading: ClientsTable shows LoadingSkeleton rows
  - Error: error banner above table
  - Empty: EmptyStateBlock with "Add your first client" message
  - Success: table populated
- **Mapped Story:** US-CLIENT-01

---

### PAGE: src/pages/ClientDetailPage.jsx
- **Maps to UX Screen:** S-019 — Client Detail Page
- **Single Responsibility:** Renders the full client detail view with linked projects and invoices
- **Route Path:** `/clients/:id`
- **Auth Required:** Yes
- **Imports From:**
  - Layout: AppLayout.jsx
  - Components: Breadcrumb.jsx, ClientDetailHeader.jsx, ClientInfoCard.jsx, ActivitySummaryCard.jsx, ClientProjectsTableCard (uses LinkedInvoicesTable pattern), ClientInvoicesTableCard, ArchiveWarningBanner (inline JSX), ProjectCreateModal.jsx, InvoiceCreateModal.jsx, ClientAddEditModal.jsx, LoadingSkeleton.jsx
  - Hooks: useClients.js, useProjects.js, useInvoices.js
- **Data Flow:**
  - useClients().getClientById(id) → client data
  - useProjects().fetchProjects({ clientId: id }) → linked projects
  - useInvoices().fetchInvoices({ clientId: id }) → linked invoices
- **User Flows:**
  - "Edit Client" → ClientAddEditModal (edit mode)
  - "Invite Client" → calls inviteClient(id)
  - Project row click → `/projects/:id`
  - Invoice row click → `/invoices/my` with selected invoice
  - "Create Project" → ProjectCreateModal (client pre-selected)
  - "Create Invoice" → InvoiceCreateModal (client pre-selected)
  - Breadcrumb "Clients" → `/clients`
  - "Unarchive" banner link → calls unarchiveClient(id)
- **States to Handle:**
  - Loading: full page skeleton
  - Error: error banner + retry
  - Empty (sub-tables): individual empty states per table
  - Success: all data rendered
- **Mapped Story:** US-CLIENT-03

---

### PAGE: src/pages/ProjectsPage.jsx
- **Maps to UX Screen:** S-005 — Projects List
- **Single Responsibility:** Renders the projects management list with filter tabs and card grid
- **Route Path:** `/projects`
- **Auth Required:** Yes
- **Imports From:**

  - Components: ProjectCard.jsx, ProjectCreateModal.jsx, FilterTabBar.jsx, SearchInput.jsx, PrimaryButton.jsx, LoadingSkeleton.jsx, EmptyStateBlock.jsx
  - Hooks: useProjects.js
- **Data Flow:**
  - useProjects().fetchProjects({ status, search, page }) → projects array
  - Passes each project to ProjectCard
- **User Flows:**
  - "Create Project" → ProjectCreateModal
  - Filter tab click → filters the card grid by status
  - Project card click → `/projects/:id`
- **States to Handle:**
  - Loading: skeleton cards
  - Error: error message
  - Empty: EmptyStateBlock with "Create Project" CTA
  - Success: card grid populated
- **Mapped Story:** US-PROJ-01

### PAGE: src/pages/ProjectDetailPage.jsx
- **Maps to UX Screen:** S-018 — Project Detail Page
- **Single Responsibility:** Renders the full project detail view with linked invoices and time logs
- **Route Path:** `/projects/:id`
- **Auth Required:** Yes
- **Imports From:**
  - Layout: AppLayout.jsx
  - Components: Breadcrumb.jsx, ProjectDetailHeader.jsx, ProjectOverviewCard.jsx, ProjectStatsCard.jsx, ClientDetailCard (ClientInfoCard variant), LinkedInvoicesTable.jsx, LinkedTimeLogsTable.jsx, ProjectCreateModal.jsx, InvoiceCreateModal.jsx, TimeLogModal.jsx, LoadingSkeleton.jsx
  - Hooks: useProjects.js, useInvoices.js, useTimeLogs.js
- **Data Flow:**
  - useProjects().getProjectById(id) → project + stats
  - useInvoices().fetchInvoices({ projectId: id }) → linked invoices
  - useTimeLogs().fetchTimeLogs({ projectId: id }) → linked time logs
- **User Flows:**
  - "Edit Project" → ProjectCreateModal (edit mode, pre-filled)
  - "Create Invoice" → InvoiceCreateModal (project pre-selected)
  - "Log Time" in LinkedTimeLogsTable → TimeLogModal (project pre-selected)
  - Invoice row click → `/invoices/my` with selected invoice
  - Breadcrumb "Projects" → `/projects`
- **States to Handle:**
  - Loading: full page skeleton
  - Error: error banner + retry
  - Empty sub-tables: individual empty states
  - Success: all data rendered
- **Mapped Story:** US-PROJ-03

### PAGE: src/pages/InvoicesPage.jsx
- **Maps to UX Screen:** S-007 — Invoices (Card Grid)
- **Single Responsibility:** Renders the invoices card grid with filter tabs and create action
- **Route Path:** `/invoices`
- **Auth Required:** Yes
- **Imports From:**
  - Layout: AppLayout.jsx
  - Components: InvoiceCard.jsx, InvoiceCreateModal.jsx, FilterTabBar.jsx, SearchInput.jsx, PrimaryButton.jsx, LoadingSkeleton.jsx, EmptyStateBlock.jsx
  - Hooks: useInvoices.js
- **Data Flow:**
  - useInvoices().fetchInvoices({ status, search, page }) → invoices array
  - Passes each invoice to InvoiceCard
- **User Flows:**
  - "Create Invoice" → InvoiceCreateModal
  - Filter tab click → filters grid by status
  - Invoice card click → `/invoices/my` (with that invoice pre-selected in the detail panel)

  - Error: error message
  - Empty: EmptyStateBlock with "Create Invoice" CTA
  - Success: card grid rendered

---

### PAGE: src/pages/MyInvoicesPage.jsx
- **Maps to UX Screen:** S-008 — My Invoices (Table + Detail Panel)
- **Single Responsibility:** Renders the split-panel invoices view: list on the left, detail panel on the right
- **Route Path:** `/invoices/my`
- **Auth Required:** Yes
- **Imports From:**
  - Layout: AppLayout.jsx
  - Components: InvoiceListTable.jsx, InvoiceDetailPanel.jsx, LoadingSkeleton.jsx, EmptyStateBlock.jsx
  - Hooks: useInvoices.js
- **Data Flow:**
  - useInvoices().fetchInvoices() → list for left panel
  - useInvoices().getInvoiceById(selectedId) → full detail for right panel
  - selectedInvoiceId managed in local state (useState)
- **User Flows:**
  - Invoice list row click → sets selectedInvoiceId → right panel updates
  - "Download PDF" → calls api.downloadInvoicePDF(id) → triggers file download
  - On mobile: list shows first; clicking a row navigates to full-screen detail view
- **States to Handle:**
  - Loading (list): skeleton rows in left panel
  - Loading (detail): skeleton in right panel while switching
  - Error: error banner
  - Empty (list): "No invoices yet" in left panel
  - Empty (detail): placeholder prompt "Select an invoice to view details"
  - Success: split panel rendered
- **Mapped Story:** US-INV-02

---

### PAGE: src/pages/TimeLogsPage.jsx
- **Maps to UX Screen:** S-009 (empty/loading states) + S-017 (populated state)
- **Single Responsibility:** Renders the time logs page — empty, loading, and populated states
- **Route Path:** `/time-logs`
- **Auth Required:** Yes
- **Imports From:**
  - Layout: AppLayout.jsx
  - Components: TimeLogsTable.jsx, TimeLogCardMobile.jsx, TimeLogModal.jsx, TimeLogsSummaryBar.jsx, SearchInput.jsx, SelectDropdown.jsx, EmptyStateBlock.jsx, LoadingSkeleton.jsx, PrimaryButton.jsx
  - Hooks: useTimeLogs.js, useProjects.js (for project dropdown filter)
- **Data Flow:**
  - useTimeLogs().fetchTimeLogs({ projectId, search, startDate, endDate, page }) → timeLogs
  - useProjects().fetchProjects({ status: "Active" }) → for project filter dropdown
  - On add: useTimeLogs().addTimeLog(data) → refetch list
  - On edit: opens TimeLogModal pre-filled → useTimeLogs().editTimeLog(id, data)
  - On delete: ConfirmDialog → useTimeLogs().removeTimeLog(id)
- **User Flows:**
  - "Log Time" button → opens TimeLogModal
  - Empty state "Log Time" button → same
  - Edit row action → opens TimeLogModal pre-filled
  - Delete row action → ConfirmDialog → delete
- **States to Handle:**
  - Loading: LoadingSkeleton (skeleton table)
  - Error: error banner
  - Empty: EmptyStateBlock (clock illustration, "No Time Logs Yet", "Log Time" CTA)
  - Success: TimeLogsTable + TimeLogsSummaryBar
- **Mapped Story:** US-TIME-01, US-TIME-02

---

### PAGE: src/pages/SettingsPage.jsx
- **Maps to UX Screen:** S-010 — Settings
- **Single Responsibility:** Renders the settings page with profile form and notification preferences

- **Data Flow:**

  - Toggle change: useSettings().updateNotification(key, value) — auto-saves
- **States to Handle:**

  - Error: toast on save failure
  - Empty: N/A
  - Success: toast on successful save
- **Mapped Story:** US-SET-01

## 6. Component Registry

### COMPONENT: src/components/layout/AppLayout.jsx
- **Maps to UX Component:** App shell — sidebar + content area (all authenticated screens)
- **Single Responsibility:** Wraps all authenticated pages with Sidebar (desktop), TopHeaderBar, MobileDrawer, and main content slot
- **Props:**
  | Prop Name | Type | Required | Default | Purpose |
  |-----------|------|----------|---------|---------|
  | children | ReactNode | yes | — | Page content rendered in the main area |
- **Events / Callbacks:** None
- **Local State:** isMobileDrawerOpen (boolean)
- **Imports From:** Sidebar.jsx, TopHeaderBar.jsx, MobileDrawer.jsx
- **Mapped Story:** All authenticated stories

---

### COMPONENT: src/components/layout/Sidebar.jsx
- **Maps to UX Component:** Sidebar Navigation (S-003 through S-010)
- **Single Responsibility:** Fixed left navigation panel with logo and nav items (desktop only)
- **Props:**
  | Prop Name | Type | Required | Default | Purpose |
  |-----------|------|----------|---------|---------|
  | currentPath | string | yes | — | Active route for highlight logic |
- **Events / Callbacks:** None (uses NavLink from react-router-dom for active state)
- **Local State:** None
- **Imports From:** @heroicons/react (icons), react-router-dom (NavLink)
- **Mapped Story:** US-DASH-01

---

### COMPONENT: src/components/layout/TopHeaderBar.jsx
- **Maps to UX Component:** Top Content Header Bar (S-003 through S-010)
- **Single Responsibility:** Sticky top bar with tab navigation (My Projects / My Invoices), notification bell, and user avatar
- **Props:**
  | Prop Name | Type | Required | Default | Purpose |
  |-----------|------|----------|---------|---------|
  | onHamburgerClick | function | yes | — | Opens mobile drawer |
  | actionButton | ReactNode | no | null | Context action button (e.g., "Log Time") rendered on the right |
- **Events / Callbacks:**
  | Callback Prop | When Triggered | Params |
  |---------------|---------------|--------|
  | onHamburgerClick | Hamburger icon tap (mobile) | — |
- **Local State:** None
- **Imports From:** AuthContext (for avatar/user name), react-router-dom (NavLink for tabs), @heroicons/react
- **Mapped Story:** US-DASH-01

---

### COMPONENT: src/components/layout/MobileDrawer.jsx
- **Maps to UX Component:** Mobile navigation drawer (hamburger-triggered)
- **Single Responsibility:** Full-screen left-sliding nav drawer for mobile viewports
- **Props:**
  | Prop Name | Type | Required | Default | Purpose |
  |-----------|------|----------|---------|---------|
  | isOpen | boolean | yes | — | Controls open/close state |
  | onClose | function | yes | — | Closes the drawer |
- **Events / Callbacks:**
  | Callback Prop | When Triggered | Params |
  |---------------|---------------|--------|
  | onClose | Backdrop click or close button | — |
- **Local State:** None
- **Imports From:** @heroicons/react, react-router-dom (NavLink)
- **Mapped Story:** All mobile authenticated screens

- **Maps to UX Component:** Public page wrapper (no sidebar)
- **Single Responsibility:** Wraps public pages (Landing, Login, SignUp, ForgotPassword) without the sidebar
- **Props:**
  | Prop Name | Type | Required | Default | Purpose |
  |-----------|------|----------|---------|---------|
  | children | ReactNode | yes | — | Page content |
- **Events / Callbacks:** None
- **Local State:** None
- **Imports From:** None

### COMPONENT: src/components/common/StatusBadge.jsx
- **Maps to UX Component:** Status Badge (used across all screens)
- **Single Responsibility:** Renders a colored pill badge based on status value
- **Props:**
  | Prop Name | Type | Required | Default | Purpose |
  |-----------|------|----------|---------|---------|
  | status | string | yes | — | One of: Active, Archived, Draft, Sent, Viewed, Paid, PartiallyPaid, Overdue, OnHold, Completed, Processed, Locked |
- **Events / Callbacks:** None
- **Local State:** None
- **Imports From:** None (pure Tailwind class map)
- **Notes:** Maps status → Tailwind bg + text color class. Overdue includes a warning triangle icon (⚠️ or HeroIcon).
- **Mapped Story:** All stories involving status display

---

### COMPONENT: src/components/common/PrimaryButton.jsx
- **Maps to UX Component:** Primary Button
- **Single Responsibility:** Solid blue primary action button
- **Props:**
  | Prop Name | Type | Required | Default | Purpose |
  |-----------|------|----------|---------|---------|
  | children | ReactNode | yes | — | Button label |
  | onClick | function | no | — | Click handler |
  | type | string | no | "button" | HTML button type (button/submit) |
  | isLoading | boolean | no | false | Shows spinner, disables button |
  | disabled | boolean | no | false | Disables button |
  | className | string | no | "" | Additional Tailwind classes for width/size overrides |

## 7. API Service Registry (api.js)
All backend calls go through `src/services/api.js`. Zero fetch/axios calls anywhere else.

| Function Name | HTTP Method | Endpoint | Request Params | Returns |
|---------------|-------------|----------|----------------|---------|
| registerUser | POST | /auth/register | { name, email, password } | { userId, name, email } |
| loginUser | POST | /auth/login | { email, password } | { token, refreshToken, user } |
| refreshTokens | POST | /auth/refresh | { refreshToken } | { token, refreshToken } |
| logoutUser | POST | /auth/logout | { refreshToken } | void |
| forgotPassword | POST | /auth/forgot-password | { email } | void |
| resetPassword | POST | /auth/reset-password | { token, newPassword } | void |
| verifyEmail | POST | /auth/verify-email | { token } | void |
| acceptClientInvite | POST | /auth/client-portal/accept | { token, password } | { token, refreshToken, user } |
| getClients | GET | /clients | { search?, status?, page?, limit? } (query params) | { clients, total } |
| createClient | POST | /clients | { name, company, email, phone, notes } | client object |
| getClientById | GET | /clients/:id | — | client object |
| updateClient | PUT | /clients/:id | { name?, company?, email?, phone?, notes? } | updated client |
| archiveClient | PATCH | /clients/:id/archive | — | { _id, status } |
| unarchiveClient | PATCH | /clients/:id/unarchive | — | { _id, status } |
| inviteClient | POST | /clients/:id/invite | — | { inviteToken, expiresAt } |
| getProjects | GET | /projects | { status?, clientId?, search?, page?, limit? } | { projects, total } |
| createProject | POST | /projects | { name, clientId, status?, description?, startDate?, deadline?, budget?, hourlyRate? } | project object |
| getProjectById | GET | /projects/:id | — | project + stats |
| updateProject | PUT | /projects/:id | partial project fields | updated project |
| archiveProject | PATCH | /projects/:id/archive | — | { _id, status } |
| getTimeLogs | GET | /time-logs | { projectId?, search?, startDate?, endDate?, page?, limit? } | { timeLogs, total, totalHours, billableHours } |
| createTimeLog | POST | /time-logs | { projectId, date, hours, minutes, description? } | time log object |
| updateTimeLog | PUT | /time-logs/:id | partial time log fields | updated time log |
| deleteTimeLog | DELETE | /time-logs/:id | — | void |
| getInvoices | GET | /invoices | { status?, clientId?, search?, page?, limit? } | { invoices, total } |
| createInvoice | POST | /invoices | { clientId, projectId?, invoiceNumber?, issueDate, dueDate, lineItems[], taxPercent?, notes?, timeLogIds? } | invoice object |
| getInvoiceById | GET | /invoices/:id | — | full invoice with lineItems + payments |
| updateInvoice | PUT | /invoices/:id | partial invoice fields | updated invoice |
| sendInvoice | PATCH | /invoices/:id/send | — | { _id, status: "Sent" } |
| downloadInvoicePDF | GET | /invoices/:id/pdf | — | Blob (PDF binary) |
| recordPayment | POST | /invoices/:id/payments | { amount, method?, notes? } | { payment, updatedStatus } |
| getDashboardMetrics | GET | /dashboard | — | dashboard metrics object |
| getAuditLogs | GET | /audit-logs | { entityType?, entityId?, page?, limit? } | { logs, total } |
| getSettings | GET | /settings | — | { profile, notifications } |
| updateSettings | PUT | /settings | { name?, company?, notifications? } | updated settings |
| getPortalInvoices | GET | /portal/invoices | — | { invoices } (client JWT) |
| getPortalInvoiceById | GET | /portal/invoices/:id | — | full invoice (client JWT) |
| getPortalProjects | GET | /portal/projects | — | { projects } (client JWT) |

**Notes:** 
- All functions attach JWT via Axios request interceptor that reads token from AuthContext
- On 401 response, interceptor calls authService.refreshTokens() and retries once
- On second 401 failure: calls logout() and redirects to /login

---

## 8. Hook Registry

| Hook File | State Managed | Functions Exported | API Functions Called |
|-----------|--------------|-------------------|---------------------|
| useAuth.js | user, token, refreshToken, isAuthenticated, isLoading | login, register, logout, checkAuth | loginUser, registerUser, logoutUser, refreshTokens |
| useClients.js | clients, total, isLoading, error | fetchClients, getClientById, createClient, updateClient, archiveClient, unarchiveClient, inviteClient | getClients, getClientById, createClient, updateClient, archiveClient, unarchiveClient, inviteClient |
| useProjects.js | projects, total, isLoading, error | fetchProjects, getProjectById, createProject, updateProject, archiveProject | getProjects, getProjectById, createProject, updateProject, archiveProject |
| useTimeLogs.js | timeLogs, total, totalHours, billableHours, isLoading, error | fetchTimeLogs, addTimeLog, editTimeLog, removeTimeLog | getTimeLogs, createTimeLog, updateTimeLog, deleteTimeLog |
| useInvoices.js | invoices, total, selectedInvoice, isLoading, error | fetchInvoices, getInvoiceById, createInvoice, updateInvoice, sendInvoice, downloadPDF, recordPayment | getInvoices, getInvoiceById, createInvoice, updateInvoice, sendInvoice, downloadInvoicePDF, recordPayment |
| useDashboard.js | metrics, isLoading, error | fetchMetrics | getDashboardMetrics |
| useSettings.js | settings (profile + notifications), isLoading, isSaving, error | fetchSettings, updateSettings, updateNotification | getSettings, updateSettings |
| useToast.js | — (reads from ToastContext) | showSuccess(message), showError(message), dismiss() | none |

---

## 9. Route Definitions (App.jsx)

| Path | Component/Page | Auth Required | Redirect if Unauth |
|------|---------------|--------------|-------------------|
| `/` | LandingPage | No | — |
| `/login` | LoginPage | No (redirect if authed → /dashboard) | — |
| `/signup` | SignUpPage | No (redirect if authed → /dashboard) | — |
| `/forgot-password` | ForgotPasswordPage | No | — |
| `/dashboard` | DashboardPage | Yes | /login |
| `/clients` | ClientsPage | Yes | /login |
| `/clients/:id` | ClientDetailPage | Yes | /login |
| `/projects` | ProjectsPage | Yes | /login |
| `/projects/:id` | ProjectDetailPage | Yes | /login |
| `/invoices` | InvoicesPage | Yes | /login |
| `/invoices/my` | MyInvoicesPage | Yes | /login |
| `/time-logs` | TimeLogsPage | Yes | /login |
| `/settings` | SettingsPage | Yes | /login |
| `*` | NotFoundPage | No | — |

---
